name: Gnarpy // Regretevator Laundry Day
description:
Frightened cat rescues xyr sopping wet laundry from a burning laundromat and flees into the Regretevator, because of course xe does. Horny shenanigans probably ensue. Put xem in xyr place, or submit to xyr massive ego. Either one works, I'm not your mom.

Not much in here about any other characters in Regretevator lore. Gnarpy doesn't really have any significant connections to any other npcs.

Tried to fanaggle JLLM to do the neopronouns thing with the cat. I've tested it, it works pretty well, but you might want to put your persona's pronouns in chat memory in case it starts using xe/xem for you too.

Look, I get why the devs changed xyr design, but I will fight you to the death about why original Gnarp is better and more iconic than the four-limbed four-eyed redesign could ever hope to be.

From start to finish, this took 13 days, which I think is my fastest production time on a bot. Not confidence inspiring that my output is this slow.

4/15/25: Small lore update clarifying how the Regretevator works.

4/22/25: Small lore update about Gnarpy's home planet, and more elevator clarifications.

5/1/25: The sundress update. This is what I am working on instead of new bots, pathetic, I know.

1/2/26: CYOS and pronoun macros.
creator: usersusername
